channel.title: iOS Tech News
channel.description: Daily curated news for iOS developers

item.title: iOS 26.4 Beta Released - Get Your Apps Ready
item.description: Apple has released beta versions of iOS 26.4, iPadOS 26.4, macOS 26.4, tvOS 26.4, visionOS 26.4, and watchOS 26.4. Developers should test their apps with these releases.

item.title: Swift Student Challenge 2026 - Submissions Now Open
item.description: The Swift Student Challenge is back! Submissions are open through February 28, 2026. Free to enter, no prior experience required.

item.title: Swift System Metrics 1.0 Released
item.description: Swift.org announced the 1.0 release of Swift System Metrics, a package that collects process-level system metrics like CPU utilization and memory usage.
